transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Friday, July 17. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. US launches fresh strikes on Iran; state TV says Bandar Abbas hit by projectiles. United States forces conducted a new wave of strikes against Iran on Thursday. These attacks marked the fifth consecutive night of military operations by the US. The strikes targeted Iran's military capabilities and facilities in Bandar Abbas. This escalation follows recent attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Acquitted 45 yrs on, after serving life term; murder in 1977, conviction 1981, clean chit 2026. The Supreme Court acquitted three surviving accused in a 49-year-old murder case. This decision came after the accused had served life imprisonment sentences. The court found serious infirmities in the prosecution's case and witness testimonies. Inconsistencies in witness accounts led to granting the benefit of doubt. Bumrah scripts never-seen-before England record with first-ball stunner. Ben Duckett became the first England batter dismissed on the opening ball against India. Jasprit Bumrah provided India with an ideal start in the chase of 234. India posted a below-par 233 after a middle-order collapse in their innings. Virat Kohli and Shreyas Iyer scored 65 and 66 respectively. Jeff Bezos donates $10m to LA that city's mayor says is about investing in culture. Jeff Bezos' Earth Fund has granted $10.1 million for Watts Towers Arts Center Campus improvements. This investment will expand usable park space and introduce new cooling features. The project aims to strengthen the campus as a cultural hub before the 2028 Olympics. Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass welcomed the significant milestone for the community. 'Engines didn't start': SpaceX aborts Starship's 13th test just before liftoff. SpaceX's Starship rocket aborted its thirteenth flight test just before liftoff. The automated launch scrub occurred moments before the planned liftoff from Texas. Raptor engines ignited but shut down shortly afterward, preventing the launch. Engineers will investigate the cause and determine a new launch attempt. Long-term exposure to air pollution could lead to dementia, warns WHO. New WHO guidelines suggest up to 45 percent of dementia cases are preventable. Tackling risk factors like high blood pressure and air pollution is advised. Healthy lifestyles and managing chronic diseases significantly influence brain health. The guidelines recommend regular physical activity and quitting tobacco use. Trump admin limits students visa tenure to fixed period of 4 yrs, limits academic flexibility. The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has finalised a major regulatory change that will add to the cost of higher studies in the US through periodic visa extensions and also lead to uncertainty. How Russian oligarch's superyacht used 'vanishing tech' to cross Hormuz. The superyacht Nord arrived in Bali after a mysterious journey. It navigated the dangerous Strait of Hormuz by disabling its tracking system. This massive vessel covered over four thousand nautical miles across the Indian Ocean. The yacht, valued at $500 million, is equipped with advanced features. Skyroot Aerospace to launch India's first private orbital rocket on Saturday. India's private space sector is poised for a significant advancement this Saturday. Skyroot Aerospace will launch the Vikram-1, its first orbital-class rocket. This historic mission, named Mission Aagaman, will lift off from Sriharikota. The rocket carries technology demonstration payloads and unique artwork into space. California may get $65M to leave 65 billion gallons in Lake Mead. Historically low water levels are plaguing Lake Mead, affecting millions in various states and Mexico. To combat this, federal funds will support efforts to keep water in the reservoir this year, coupled with initiatives aimed at conserving agricultural water annually. While these measures are crucial for now, achieving lasting change will necessitate cooperation among Colorado River Basin states regarding future water management. Trump to allege Chinese meddling in US elections during primetime speech: Report. US President Donald Trump is expected to allege previously unreported Chinese interference in US elections during a primetime address on Thursday, including claims that Beijing compromised US voter data and that the CIA was aware of the activity but did not inform him during his first term, according to a report by CBS News, citing sources familiar with the matter. Canada to stop accepting new Parents and Grandparents Program applications. Canada is pausing new applications for the Parents and Grandparents Program. Existing applications will be processed, and 15,000 people will be approved in 2026. Family reunification remains a priority, and the super visa offers extended visits for relatives. The government aims to reduce processing times and improve predictability for families.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. Prime Minister's Office Seeks Report On Protests Against Ken-Betwa Link Project In Madhya Pradesh. The PMO sought a report from the state government about the reasons for the protests, wishing to know whether the compensation or any other issues enraged them. CM Mohan Yadav To Inspect The Country's Longest Sleemanabad Water Tunnel Today In Katni District. The water tunnel is not merely a mechanical structure built with concrete and stone but is also described as a bridge destined to heal a centuries-old mythical separation. 5 Ulbs Of Madhya Pradesh Failed To Get The Urban Challenge Fund In First Phase. Under the Urban Challenge Fund, Madhya Pradesh plans to implement projects worth rupees 20,000 crore over five years. PM MITRA Park In Dhar To Generate Jobs For 3Lakh People, Says CM Mohan Yadav. A new industrial area is developing in Narmadapuram with investments worth rupees 11,500 crore, and an IT Park is coming up in Rewa, he said. Madhya Pradesh's first international flight service to begin from Indore today. rupees 100-Crore Senior Citizen Complex Lies Abandoned, Indore Development Authority Struggling To Find An Agency. To revive the facility, IDA has initiated the process of appointing a new operator. 'Little to no change in Bhopal's traffic woes despite 9 meetings'. Indore Bar Association Launches Crackdown On Fake Lawyers In District Court. To encourage complaints, the association has placed a complaint box outside the District Bar office where informants can submit the suspect's name, address and mobile number. Bharat Tex 2026 Day 3 Advances Sustainable Textiles, Circularity, Future-Ready Skills and Global Trade. National Meet in Bhopal Reinforces Missionary Collaboration and Evangelisation. Hindu mob vandalizes Catholic school in India's Madhya Pradesh. Couple Cleared In Special Prevention Of Money Laundering Act Case After 15 Years In Indore. The court also noted that there was no record of the state government filing an appeal before the High Court against the acquittal in the original criminal case. MP Emerges as Investors' Preferred Destination. Madhya Pradesh Re NEET 2026 Toppers List Out: Top Rankers, Marks and Percentile. Empty platform, locked ticket stalls: rupees 6-crore Bhopal station bears deserted look. Renowned Indian cricketer Kranti Gaud receives warm welcome at SAI CRC Bhopal, Abhisek Singh Chauhan applauds her achievements. Pyramid Racket Busted After Girls Allege 'Trafficking and Confinement' In Indore. The network functioned as an alleged pyramid scheme. Bhopal double murder: Broker's wife, son held for destroying evidence. Indore Postal Officer Murder Case -- Digital Silence Complicates The Hunt For The Suspect. He even called his father once, speaking with him for more than five minutes. MP ranks 27th out of 36 in school edu index.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Netflix earnings in focus as shares gain slightly amid growth concerns. Wall Street expects Netflix to report second-quarter revenue of about $13 billion, representing a 14 percent year-over-year increase, while earnings per share are projected to rise 10 percent to 79 cents Caliber Mining IPO raises rupees 135 crore from anchor investors ahead of issue opening. Caliber Mining and Logistics Limited raised rupees 134.99 crore from anchor investors ahead of its IPO, which opens on July 17, 2026. The firm allocated 31,83,961 shares at rupees 424 each, with notable participation from various domestic mutual funds and investment trusts. SBI Funds Management IPO closes with 42x subscription, led by strong QIB demand; GMP signals healthy listing. SBI Funds Management's IPO received strong demand, oversubscribed over 41 times with bids for 519 crore shares. The price band is set at rupees 545- rupees 575 per share, with a potential listing price of rupees 669, reflecting a 16.55 percent premium. Alpine Texworld IPO sails through on Day 3: Check subscription status, GMP and other key details. Alpine Texworld's IPO was fully subscribed on the final day, achieving 1.40 times overall subscription. The company aims to raise rupees 126 crore with fresh shares to fund a new weaving unit in Ahmedabad. Allotments are scheduled for July 17, with listing on BSE and NSE expected on July 21. Wall Street slips as retail sales growth cools, AI stock valuation concerns weigh on markets. As of 10 a.m. Eastern Time, the S and P 500 fell 0.3 percent , the Dow Jones Industrial Average was down less than 0.1 percent , and the Nasdaq Composite was 0.9 percent lower. Jio Financial Services Q1 results: Net profit jumps 156 percent YoY to rupees 830 crore, revenue tops rupees 2,000 crore. Jio Financial Services reported a Q1 FY27 net profit of rupees 830 crore, up 156 percent YoY and 205 percent sequentially. Revenue soared to rupees 2,004 crore, reflecting 223 percent growth. Despite rising expenses, strong core income drove profit growth, with total income increasing 141 percent YoY to rupees 1,496 crore. US stock market today: Wall Street futures edge lower as chip stocks retreat; crude oil extends gains. US stock futures fluctuated as investors remained cautious over Middle East tensions. While S and P 500 and Nasdaq futures fell, Dow futures gained. Investors are looking toward tech earnings, and oil prices rose after renewed conflicts over Iran threaten global energy supply routes. A 'Trump put' for oil? Indian refiners think so. Indian refiners expect stable oil supplies despite renewed West Asia conflict. Tech Mahindra Q1 Results 2026: Consolidated net profit rises over 28 percent to rupees 1,465 crore, revenue up 15 percent - Key takeaways. Tech Mahindra reported a consolidated net profit of rupees 1465.1 crore for Q1 2026, a 28.4 percent increase year-over-year. Revenue from operations rose 15 percent to rupees 15,605.50 crore compared to rupees 13,569.5 crore in the same quarter last year. What led to the stampede scare at Puri Rath Yatra. During the Puri Rath Yatra festival, an unfortunate incident resulted in the death of one devotee, while more than 100 others were rescued from a sudden crowd surge on the Grand Road. Wipro Q1 results: Profit remains flat YoY at rupees 3,352 crore; declares interim dividend of rupees 2. Wipro Q1 results: Wipro reported a 0.65 percent year-on-year rise in its consolidated profit to rupees 3,352 crore. Revenue from operations for the quarter rose by 10.6 percent YoY to rupees 24,478.6 crore. RBI bans sale of stressed assets back to defaulters. New Reserve Bank of India norms will prevent lenders from reselling acquired assets to defaulting borrowers. Reliance Q1 Results Preview: O2C, Jio to drive earnings - Key things to watch out for. Reliance Industries is set to announce Q1 FY27 results on July 17, with expectations of consolidated growth. The O2C segment is likely to recover, while retail performance remains mixed amid subdued consumer demand. Analysts predict revenue growth between rupees 3.09 to rupees 3.20 trillion. Top 5 tech and startup stories of the day. Wipro posted flat first-quarter profit despite higher revenues. Top Gainers and Losers on 16 July: ABB India, Jindal Saw, Kaynes Tech, IIFL Finance, SRF, among top gainers. The Indian stock market was range-bound on July 16, affected by Middle Eastern tensions and a weak rupee. Nifty 50 and Sensex closed flat, with mixed sector performances. Nifty Consumer Durables gained 1.60 percent , while Nifty Realty dropped nearly 1 percent . Word architect lived on $100million superyacht. Charles Simonyi, known for Microsoft Word and Excel, avoided property taxes by living on a superyacht. Stock market today: Sensex, Nifty end flat; mid, small-caps underperform; escalating US-Iran conflict weigh on sentiment. The Sensex ended 1 point up at 77,186.87, while the Nifty 50 slipped 6 points to settle at 24,072.75. Mid and small-cap indices underperformed. The Nifty Midcap 100 index dropped 0.41 percent , while the Smallcap 100 index fell 0.10 percent . NEET Result 2026 declared at neet.nta.nic.in. Re-NEET UG Result: The National Testing Agency has declared the Re-NEET Result 2026 for candidates at neet.nta.nic.in. Retail investors return with vengeance in Q1 but start selling again in July. In April-June, retail investors bought equities worth a net rupees 39,287 crore, the highest since rupees 42,746 crore clocked in October-December 2024. NEET UG 2026 results declared: Check toppers list. National Testing Agency declared NEET UG 2026 results with two joint toppers. BHEL Q1 results: BHEL swings to rupees 376.71 crore net profit in June quarter. BHEL posted a consolidated net profit of rupees 376.71 crore in the June quarter of the current financial year, supported by increased income. Matt Damon: 'I stopped eating gluten'. Matt Damon Odyssey diet: Matt Damon adopted a gluten-free diet for his role in The Odyssey. Metal stock Shyam Metalics hits a record high after this business update. Details here. As per the BSE data, Shyam Metalics shares have gained over 23 percent year-to-date, while in a shorter timeframe of three months, it has gained nearly 21 percent . On a monthly scale, the stock is up over 9 percent so far in July. Jio Financial profit leaps 155 percent to rupees 830 cr in Q1 show. Jio Financial on Thursday reported 155 percent year-on-year (YoY) growth in its consolidated net profit at rupees 830 crore in the first quarter. Paytm board to consider first-ever bonus issue along with Q1FY27 results on this date. Check details. One 97 Communications, Paytm's parent company, will consider a bonus share issue at its upcoming board meeting on July 20, 2026. This follows the company's financial results for Q1FY27, marked by rising stock prices and improved investor sentiment. Sonam Wangchuk strike: Celebs rally behind him. Sonam Wangchuk news: Sonam Wangchuk's hunger strike continues for nineteen days now. ITC Hotels Q1 Results: PAT jumps 35 percent to rupees 180 crore, revenue grows 15 percent YoY; announces acquisition of GHK Hospitality. ITC Hotels Q1 Results: The company's revenue from operations in Q1FY27 grew 14.8 percent to rupees 936.02 crore from rupees 815.54 crore, year-on-year (YoY). Trump team races to rebuild US tariff wall. A Supreme Court ruling has led to a notable decline in Treasury revenue from import taxes in the United States. Why standalone health insurers may outshine ICICI Lombard after Q1. ICICI Lombard's strong retail health growth was overshadowed by weak fire insurance premiums and profitability pressures, making standalone health insurers look more attractive to investors. Iran-US hostilities rattle Hormuz oil traffic. United States forces struck an oil tanker near Iran's Kharg Island terminal.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. Senior citizen FD rates: These banks offer up to 8.5 percent interest despite recent rate cuts. For senior citizens, even a marginal difference in interest rates can translate into substantially higher earnings over time, particularly on large deposits. Comparing FD rates across banks before investing can help maximise interest income without increasing investment risk. Power of compounding: Here's how much minimum you need to invest monthly in PPF to make your child a crorepati. Attention parents! Want to start a public provident fund account for your child? We calculate the minimum amount you would need to invest in their PPF per month in order to successfully set them up for "crorepati" status in the long run. Filed your income-tax returns? Here's why you should complete e-Verification within 30 days , Stepwise guide. Filing ITR alone is not enough, you have to e-verify your return within 30 days so that it does not become invalid and to ensure a smooth refund process from the tax department. Check here for the step-by-step taxpayers' guide... The debt-free trap: Why shunning all forms of credit can actually stunt your financial growth. Before you vow to never borrow another rupee, here is a realistic look at how to make debt work for you, not against you. Ex-Microsoft employee walked away from rupees 1.9 crore salary, shares challenges of starting over. Christian Harms, a former Microsoft employee, has opened up about leaving a corporate job that paid $200,000 (approximately rupees 1.9 crore) a year in Switzerland to start over in Australia. Dearness Allowance: Increase in basic salary component, 3-4 percent hike expected , Why is DA important?. Dearness Allowance (DA) is a percentage of salary for central government employees and pensioners to offset inflation. Updated bi-annually, it rose from 58 percent to 60 percent in January 2026, benefiting 50 lakh employees and 65 lakh pensioners. Future hikes depend on AICPI data and government approval. Can rupees 50 lakh grow into rupees 5 crore through mutual funds? Here's what a 15-year investment could deliver. Meeting such a high-value financial goal requires careful planning, patience and the right investment strategy. ITR filing 2026: Beyond Form 16 , avoid these costly income tax compliance mistakes. Salaried workers who have switched employers, selected a suboptimal tax regime, claimed unsupported deductions, or omitted capital gains face heightened financial risks. rupees 10,000 SIP to rupees 30 lakh: These large and midcap mutual funds led 10-year returns. A rupees 10,000 monthly SIP would have grown to over rupees 30 lakh in these four large and midcap funds. Check the top-performing schemes and how they stack up over shorter investment horizons. Foreign assets are coming soon in AIS: Compliance is about to become harder to ignore. Information on foreign assets will increasingly show up in taxpayers' AIS, but the absence of an asset from the statement does not erase the legal obligation to disclose it. EPFO interest credit: Here's how to check your EPF balance, e-passbook using portal, Umang app, SMS , Stepwise guide. Labour Minister Mansukh Mandaviya said the EPFO has processed interest on provident funds of 34 crore members for FY26. Interest earned on EPF contributions is tax-exempt up to rupees 1.5 lakh under Section 80C under the old tax regime. RBI fixes SGB 2019-20 Series II redemption price at rupees 14,199. Should investors redeem now?. The Reserve Bank of India has fixed the premature redemption price for Sovereign Gold Bond 2019-20 Series II at rupees 14,199 per gram. Investors who bought the bonds in 2019 have earned more than 300 percent in capital appreciation, but tax implications should also be factored into the decision. What is a home loan top-up and when should you consider it?. A home loan top-up can offer cheaper credit than a personal loan, but only if you understand the costs, eligibility rules and hidden pitfalls. EPS 2026: Left your job before completing 10 years? Here's how your withdrawal benefit will be calculated. The new Employees' Pension Scheme, 2026, retains the withdrawal benefit for members who leave service before completing 10 years. However, it introduces a new waiting period before the benefit can be claimed. Early exit: why Indians are surrendering life insurance policies before maturity. Why do millions of policyholders who signed up for a long-term contract exit before maturity? ITR Filing 2026: Income Tax Department Introduces New Secondary Address Field. Taxpayers filing returns for AY 2026-27 will now have to provide both a primary and a secondary address. The new disclosure has been introduced in all notified ITR forms. Mutual fund not performing? Here's how experts say you should review it. A fund that tops return charts today may not necessarily be the best fit for your portfolio. Experts say investors should look beyond recent performance and evaluate consistency, risk and investment strategy before making decisions. ITR filing: ITAT deletes rupees 10 lakh Black Money Act penalty over foreign ESOP disclosure. Chennai ITAT held that a genuine failure to disclose foreign ESOPs in Schedule FA of the income tax return does not automatically warrant a penalty under the Black Money Act. GST industry survey: Assessing impact, challenges and reform imperatives. Kerala BJP reacts after 'fake' GST bill row leads to police complaint. Capital Gains Taxation of Share Buybacks: A Critical Analysis of the 2026 Reform. Presumptive taxation: Why some taxpayers could pay more tax under the new Income Tax Act. Why the rupees 200 meal voucher tax benefit won't apply to your ITR this year. Madras HC: Tax Officers Need Not Conclusively Prove Fraud Before Issuing GST SCN U/S 74. Foreign assets, income details for 2022-24 now available under AIS on income tax portal. Centre Notifies Oman's Social Protection Fund For Tax Exemption On Eligible Investments In India. ITR filing alert: More than 5 crore taxpayers have checked this statement. Have you?. UPRERA Outlines Clear Path for Homebuyers to Reclaim GST on Cancelled Flats. Government to replace Ordinance by introducing Income-tax (Amendment) Bill in Monsoon session. July-August 2026 Compliance Roadmap for SMEs: ITR, GST and ROC Deadlines You Can't Afford to Miss.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. BGMI 4.5 update: Naruto themed maps, Spider-Man mode, Ferrari cars and everything new. KRAFTON has launched BGMI 4.5, introducing a Naruto-themed gameplay mode with new locations and abilities, alongside a Spider-Man crossover, licensed Ferrari vehicles, and anniversary rewards. Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered 'personas'. Get ready for more AI characters in Fortnite. Developer Epic Games is going to let Fortnite creators publish experiences featuring characters with AI-powered voices starting on July 30th, and ahead of that launch, it's created 36 characters with "consistent voices and personas" that creators can use as NPCs. The characters include Fortnite staples like Agent San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco. In the wake of a massive hours-long gridlock event, San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie has told state regulators its time to put more requirements on robotaxi operators like Waymo. More than 400 sick as CDC searches for the source of a mystery outbreak. A growing Cyclospora outbreak has sickened more than 400 people in four states, and investigators are still searching for the contaminated food responsible. The CDC warns the actual number of cases is likely much higher and urges anyone with symptoms to seek medical care. Vivo T5 Lite 44W 5G in India with 120Hz display, 6,500mAh battery: Check price and specs. The Vivo T5 Lite 44W 5G features a 6.74-inch HD+ display, MediaTek Dimensity 6300 processor, and a 6,500mAh battery. Samsung's 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual. Samsung's Frame is different from your average 4K TV. Its biggest selling point involves what it does when you aren't actively using it. It can display art, turning your living room into a gallery. The Frame has bezels that make it look like , you guessed it , framed art, and its matte finish can SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition. The company didn't immediately say what went wrong. SpaceX's stock plunged more than 4 percent in after-hours trading before paring losses. Quantum breakthrough links light and magnetism in atomically thin materials. A new review highlights exciting progress in atomically thin quantum materials where light and magnetism work together in ways never before possible. In these materials, light-generated excitons can interact directly with magnetic behavior, creating opportunities to control magnetic states using light alone. Scientists believe this could pave the way for advanced optical memory, quantum devices, and ultra-efficient photonic technologies. Apple reveals businesses that won't be allowed to advertise on Apple Maps. Apple plans to introduce ads on Apple Maps, restricting certain businesses from advertising. Netflix says around 300 titles used generative AI. Netflix says roughly 300 titles on its platform used generative AI, most of which occurred in post-production. The streaming service revealed the news in its second-quarter earnings report released on Thursday, saying it's "increasingly leveraging these tools to deliver higher quality output more quickly and at a lower cost." It also provided some examples of Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack. Coca Cola said dairy production at its Fairlife unit will "remain suspended" in the United States following a hack. Microsoft trains sales team to talk down OpenAI, Anthropic AI models, pitches itself as 'full AI platform': Report. Microsoft is training sales teams to compete against Anthropic and OpenAI by emphasizing its superior offerings in AI. Why are people buying so many CDs?. CD sales are apparently going up, reportedly thanks to fans realizing they're an affordable way to support their favorite artists. According to a new report from research firm Luminate, 16.3 million CDs were sold in the first half of 2026 in the US, a 16 percent increase year-over-year. The growth in CD sales was driven Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her 'Mafia' skills). Ryan Beiermeister, who demonstrated cool analysis in the Founders Fund YouTube series "Mafia," has joined the firm as a partner. Google to allow third-party app stores inside Play Store from next week after Epic lawsuit. Google will permit third-party app stores on its Play Store in the US starting next week, ending its legal battle with Epic Games. Kalshi says it caught Trump's teleprompter operator insider trading. Kalshi users betting on what President Donald Trump would say during his speeches were reportedly up against tough competition: the president's teleprompter operator. ABC News reports that federal investigators believe Gabriel Perez - Trump's teleprompter operator since 2016 - used inside information to make bets on Kalshi, a major prediction market platform that allows users Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos. Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images. New York governor says she's using AI to analyze 'every single rule' in the state. New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze every single rule, regulation, policy" to check for outdated Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app. Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt. Ecovacs' self-cleaning Deebot X11 has hit a new low price. Sometimes it feels like keeping your floors clean is one of those never-ending chores, which is why it's nice to have a versatile robot vacuum take it off your hands. The Ecovacs Deebot X11 robovac / mop hybrid is designed to do just that, and it's now $699 ($400 off) at Amazon and directly from Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years. BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns. Google is better than Apple at playing the AI regulations game. Today, the European Union ordered Google to give its AI rivals greater access to Android, the open-source operating system that powers billions of devices worldwide. The demand is hardly surprising. It may look like a defeat on paper for Google, which has spent years resisting exactly this kind of access, but it is a regulatory Uber's $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint. Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company's global footprint and create one of the world's largest food-delivery platforms outside China. Roblox will let people use AI to make games on their phone. Roblox is about to let people make games with AI right inside its mobile app, which could make a platform that's already filled with content of questionable quality feel even more overloaded. The company has embraced AI with open arms, including a preview of an ambitious take on AI world models similar to Google's Project Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI. Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics. Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing X cracks down on creators who steal content. X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait. Archaeologists found Homer's Iliad inside a 1,600-year-old Egyptian mummy. A 1,600-year-old mummy discovered in Egypt has revealed something archaeologists had never seen before: a fragment of Homer's Iliad used during embalming. The papyrus was identified as part of the famous "Catalogue of Ships," one of the best-known sections of the ancient epic. Researchers say it is the first archaeological evidence of a Greek literary text being intentionally incorporated into the mummification process, adding a fascinating new chapter to the history of both literature and ancient burial customs. AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M. Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. India Opens Bidding for 10 GWh Battery Manufacturing: What It Means for EVs and Domestic Cell Production. Union Minister Pralhad Joshi Inaugurates 'White Rabbit Technology' Based Network Demonstration in Jakkur, Bengaluru. Coal India Commissions 200 MW of 300 MW Khavda Solar Project. Global Economy Slowing Down, India To Lose A Step Too: Moody's Analytics Report. Cabinet approves Mobile Phone Manufacturing Scheme (MPMS). India-EU trade pact to be signed by end of this year: Goyal. Semicon India 2.0 aims to build the entire chip ecosystem, not just fabs: MeitY Secretary S Krishnan. "Project Meghalaya" And Alleged Attempt To Destabilise Vijay Government. Trilegal Advises GIC On Acquisition of 100 percent Shareholding of Aseem Infrastructure Finance. Devendra Fadnavis orders crackdown on drug syndicates, illegal narcotics economy. India to come out soon with export-oriented fisheries policy with focus on inland fishery.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. No leak of Kudankulam nuclear reactor data, clarifies minister. Union minister Jitendra Singh asserted no sensitive data breach occurred at Kudankulam nuclear plant. Nuclear Power Corporation of India confirmed core systems remained untouched by the incident. Reliance Infrastructure's contract involved conventional services, not core nuclear systems. A third-party data center provider reported a partial data breach attempt. Acquitted 45 years on, after serving life term; murder in 1977, conviction 1981, clean chit 2026. The Supreme Court acquitted three surviving accused in a 49-year-old murder case. This decision came after the accused had served life imprisonment sentences. The court found serious infirmities in the prosecution's case and witness testimonies. Inconsistencies in witness accounts led to granting the benefit of doubt. Modi speaks to Qatar Amir, recalls legacy of his father. NEW DELHI: PM Narendra Modi spoke to Qatar Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani to convey his condolences on the passing of the latter's father Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the Father Amir of Qatar. Quote of the day inspired by Ashoka the Great: 'As long as there are people who approach the gods with greedy hearts, there will be priests with greedy hearts to receive them' and how true salvation lies in compassion and selflessness. Throughout history, the quest for immediate gratification has led to spiritual manipulation. Emperor Ashoka stood against those who exploited the fears and hopes of individuals, highlighting the transactional nature of faith. Today, the prosperity gospel and wellness movements reflect this enduring cycle. To escape this repetitive loop, we must recognize that genuine growth transcends simple transactions. Amit Shah to review border security, law and order during three-day Bengal tour. Home Minister Amit Shah will visit West Bengal for three days starting Friday. He will review border security and governance matters during his important trip. Shah will interact with BSF personnel and inaugurate development projects near the border. Later, he will chair meetings on law and order and new criminal laws. Omar Abdullah asks Centre to take humanitarian view on Wangchuk. Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah expressed concern over Sonam Wangchuk's health. He urged the central government to adopt a humanitarian approach to the issue. Wangchuk has been fasting for nineteen days and has lost significant weight. Abdullah drew parallels with the UPA government's engagement with Anna Hazare. Srinagar court grants NOC for passport to Farooq, sets conditions. A Srinagar court granted a no-objection certificate for Farooq Abdullah's passport. The court noted that pending criminal proceedings do not automatically bar travel. CBI had objected, fearing he might flee the country and evade justice. The passport was issued for one year, subject to conditions. US latest on immigration: Shrink visa duration for students, media. Under the new regulations, the student and exchange visa periods ⁠would be no longer than four years. ED questions TV host Shefali Bagga in Mahadev online betting app case. According to the agency, the Mahadev betting app case involves high-ranking politicians and bureaucrats from Chhattisgarh, and the proceeds of crime generated in the case stand at rupees 6,000 crore. rupees 100 for houses, rupees 5,000 for petrol pumps: Cash-strapped Bihar now lets panchayats collect holding tax. With over 45,000 revenue villages in the state, govt targets revenue collection of rupees 1,300 crore from rural taxes. Monsoon Session: Government likely to table 5 new Bills; 'delimitation package' not on agenda for now. The agenda for the session does not include the "delimitation package" of which the Nari Shakti Adhiniyam, or women's reservation Bill, is a significant component. IMD: Dry conditions to prevail in most parts until month end. The IMD had forecast below-normal rainfall (about 94 per cent of the long period average) over the country during July. From AAP to Congress, Samajwadi Party to National Conference, Opposition parties rally behind Sonam Wangchuk. Calling Wangchuk "a great educationist", Kejriwal said he had "worked tirelessly for the country and for Ladakh many times" and praised him for "risking his life for the country". BIMSTEC security chiefs vow to jointly combat terror, streamline maritime law enforcement. The MEA said these principles are expected to outline reference points for increasing predictability and promoting safety during maritime engagements among member states. PM Narendra Modi speaks to Amir of Qatar, conveys condolences on passing of the Father Amir. Modi also said the departed leader's enduring legacy will continue to guide the two nations for further strengthening the strategic partnership. Kandhamal riots probe among two reports 'missing', ex-CMO officials summoned in Odisha. The officials were part of Naveen Patnaik CMO, the FIR claims the reports may have been "intentionally removed, retained, concealed, destroyed or otherwise unlawfully dealt with. Amarnath Yatra bus fire: Tragedy averted as alert CRPF men evacuate pilgrims. Bus catches fire while bringing 47 pilgrims back after their trip to the Amarnath shrine. Amid rupees 500-crore donation row, Vaishno Devi Shrine Board reviews offerings system. The review was conducted by the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board under the chairmanship of J and K Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha. The Daily Catch-Up: Parliament showdown, Sonam Wangchuk and Messi's Argentina. Missed today's biggest stories?

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Zelensky's removal of popular defence minister sparks protests in Ukraine. A rift between Fedorov and Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi was apparently at the heart of Zelensky's decision. Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia. Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine. Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43. The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse. 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient. The good news from Uganda comes as the WHO chief warns the virus in DR Congo is spreading fast.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
